title: Redundant Connection II
description: Directed tree n nodes one wrong edge. Tìm edge cần sửa để thành valid rooted tree.
approach: Find node with 2 parents (candidate child), UF cycle in undirected view.
memoryTip: Redundant connection II — two parents or cycle in directed tree.

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def findRedundantDirectedConnection(self, edges: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
        n=len(edges); par=[0]*(n+1); cand=[]
        for u,v in edges:
            if par[v]: cand=[par[v],v,u,v]
            else: par[v]=u
        root=1
        def find(x, skip=-1):
            vis=set()
            while x not in vis:
                if x==skip: break
                vis.add(x); x=par[x]
            return x in vis
        if not cand: u,v=edges[-1]
        else:
            a,b,c,d=cand
            if find(c,d): return [a,b]
            return [c,d]
        for i in range(n-1,-1,-1):
            u,v=edges[i]
            par[v]=0
            if not find(u): return [u,v]
            par[v]=u
        return []

analysis.correctness: Case two parents vs cycle — try remove each candidate.
